mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_fire_drill WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY drill_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_fire_drill WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_drill WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_drill WHERE deleted = 0 AND YEAR(drill_date) = YEAR(GETDATE())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fire_drill (drill_date, drill_type, scenario, participants, evac_time, mgr_name, fire_dept_obs, result, improvement, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{drillDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{drillType}, #{scenario}, #{participants}, #{evacTime}, #{mgrName}, #{fireDeptObs}, #{result}, #{improvement}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fire_drill SET drill_date = #{drillDate,jdbcType=DATE}, drill_type = #{drillType}, scenario = #{scenario}, participants = #{participants}, evac_time = #{evacTime}, mgr_name = #{mgrName}, fire_dept_obs = #{fireDeptObs}, result = #{result}, improvement = #{improvement}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_fire_drill SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
